title: clerodendrum viscosum
intro: Clerodendrum viscosum, also known as the sticky glorybower, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and sticky leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum viscosum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water to release their medicinal compounds.
